product_overview: Pasar Antar is a traditional market delivery platform that connects buyers with trusted personal shoppers (Joki Pasar) to shop, settle, and deliver fresh goods from real Indonesian markets. The backend supports session-based authentication, end-to-end order lifecycle management, and master checklist aggregation for efficient multi-order market trips.
core_goals: Enable buyers, joki, and admins to access the platform through secure session-based authentication
Support the full order lifecycle from creation to completion with clear status transitions
Allow joki users to browse, accept, and manage assigned orders efficiently
Provide receipt upload, actual amount entry, and status updates for settlement and delivery tracking
Aggregate multiple orders into master checklists for shared market trips
Give admins visibility into checklist generation and operational monitoring

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows users to register, log in, and log out using session-based authentication.
user_flows: POST /register with valid registration data -> Receive 201/200 confirmation of account creation -> POST /login with the new credentials -> Receive 200 with authenticated session established -> Access authenticated routes successfully
POST /login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 or validation error -> Retry POST /login with corrected credentials -> Receive 200 with authenticated session established
POST /logout with an active session -> Receive 200 confirmation of logout -> Attempt GET/POST on a protected endpoint -> Receive 401/redirect requiring re-authentication

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Supports buyer order creation, joki order browsing and acceptance, receipt handling, actual amount entry, and lifecycle status updates.
user_flows: POST /buyer/orders with authenticated buyer order data -> Receive 201 confirmation and order in WAITING_FOR_JOKI -> GET /buyer/orders to view the created order -> Receive 200 with the order listed

GET /joki/orders/available with authenticated joki session -> Receive 200 with list of WAITING_FOR_JOKI orders -> POST /joki/orders/{order}/accept for a selected order -> Receive 200 and order status changes to ASSIGNED -> GET /joki/orders/assigned to confirm assignment

POST /joki/orders/{order}/receipt with receipt image data -> Receive 200 confirmation of receipt upload -> POST /joki/orders/{order}/actual-amount with the final spend value -> Receive 200 with settlement calculation for refund or additional payment -> POST /joki/orders/{order}/status with DELIVERING -> Receive 200 and order enters delivering state -> POST /joki/orders/{order}/status with COMPLETED -> Receive 200 and order completes
POST /buyer/orders with missing or invalid required fields -> Receive 422 validation errors -> Correct the payload and resend POST /buyer/orders -> Receive 201 and the order is created

POST /joki/orders/{order}/accept for an unavailable or already accepted order -> Receive 409/422 error indicating the order cannot be claimed -> GET /joki/orders/available to refresh availability -> Receive 200 with updated order list

features.name: Master Checklist Aggregation
features.description: Provides admin and joki access to aggregated master checklists and supports triggering checklist generation in the background.
user_flows: POST /admin/checklists/generate to trigger aggregation -> Receive 200 confirmation that background processing has started -> GET /admin/checklists to view generated master checklists -> Receive 200 with checklist list -> GET /admin/checklists/{checklist} to open detail -> Receive 200 with aggregated items

GET /joki/checklists/{checklist} with authenticated joki session -> Receive 200 with checklist detail for assigned market trip -> Review grouped items across multiple orders -> Use the checklist as the shopping plan

POST /admin/checklists/generate when authentication is missing -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> Authenticate via POST /login -> Retry POST /admin/checklists/generate and receive 200 confirmation
